add_query.description: Choose the entity type for this Prometheus query.

data_description.platform: Choose whether this query creates a sensor or binary sensor.

add_sensor_query.description: Add a new Prometheus query as sensor. Check the [documentation](https://developers.home-assistant.io/docs/core/entity/sensor/) for more information.

data_description.name: The name of the sensor.
data_description.state_class: The state class of the sensor.
data_description.device_class: The device class of the sensor.
data_description.unit_of_measurement: The unit of measurement for the sensor.

add_binary_query.description: Add a new Prometheus query as binary sensor. Check the [documentation](https://developers.home-assistant.io/docs/core/entity/binary_sensor/) for more information.

data_description.name: The name of the binary sensor.
data_description.device_class: The device class of the binary sensor.
data_description.value_template: Optional template rendered with value set to the query result.
